phrases.intent_en: Ask where the ticket office is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿podría indicarme dónde está la taquilla?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, po-DREE-a in-dee-KAR-me DON-de es-TAH la ta-KEE-ya?

likely_response.local: La taquilla está a la izquierda, entrada norte.
likely_response.pronunciation: LAH tah-k-EEL-lah EHSTÁ AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah ehnt-RAH-dah NOHR-teh
likely_response.translation_en: The ticket office is on the left, north entrance.

responses.english: The ticket office is on the left, north entrance.
responses.phonetic: LAH tah-k-EEL-lah EHSTÁ AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah ehnt-RAH-dah NOHR-teh
responses.local: La taquilla está a la izquierda, entrada norte.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the merchandise shop
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde puedo encontrar la tienda de regalos?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DOHN-deh PWEH-ko en-kon-TRAR la tee-EN-da deh reh-GAH-los?

likely_response.local: Junto a la entrada Montilivi, planta superior.
likely_response.pronunciation: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah mohn-tee-LEE-bee PLAHN-tah soo-peh-ree-OHR
likely_response.translation_en: Official shop near main access, second floor.

responses.english: Official shop near main access, second floor.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AH LAH ehnt-RAH-dah mohn-tee-LEE-bee PLAHN-tah soo-peh-ree-OHR
responses.local: Junto a la entrada Montilivi, planta superior.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how to locate my seat section entrance
phrases.text_local: ¿Cómo llego a la entrada de mi sección de asiento?
phrases.pronunciation: KOH-moh YEH-goh ah lah en-TRAH-dah deh mee sek-SYOHN deh ah-SYEN-toh?

likely_response.local: Siga las señales de color hacia su gradada.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs DEH koh-LOHR ah-THEE-ah SOO grah-DAH-dah
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the color signs towards your stand.

responses.english: Follow the color signs towards your stand.
responses.phonetic: SEE-gah LAHS seh-NYAH-lehs DEH koh-LOHR ah-THEE-ah SOO grah-DAH-dah
responses.local: Siga las señales de color hacia su gradada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if tickets are still available for today
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿quedan entradas disponibles para el partido hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: boo-EH-nohs DÍ-ahs k-EH-dahn ehnt-RAH-dahs dee-spoh-NEEB-lehs PAH-rah EHL pahr-TEE-doh OHY

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the central screen.

responses.english: It is indicated on the central screen.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the stadium facilities are located
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde están los servicios del estadio por favor?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh eh-STAHN lohs sehr-VEE-see-ohs dehl eh-STAH-dyoh por fah-BOR?

likely_response.local: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
likely_response.translation_en: At the end of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: At the end of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh DEHL pah-SEEL-loh AH LAH eeth-k-ee-EHR-dah
responses.local: Al fondo del pasillo, a la izquierda.
